pageTitle.description: Heading of the Episode Notes research archive page.
pageTitle.notes: 'Episode Notes' is the branded name for supplementary research that accompanies the video dossiers.

pageIntro.description: Intro paragraph under the Episode Notes page heading.

emptyState.title.description: Heading shown on the Episode Notes page when no entries have been published yet.

emptyState.body.description: Body copy for the Episode Notes empty state.

readEpisodeNote.description: Call-to-action on each Episode Note list entry.

published.description: Label preceding the publication date of a Episode Note.

volumeIssue.description: Volume and issue badge for a Episode Note.
volumeIssue.notes: {{volume}} and {{issue}} are Roman numerals (e.g. I, II). Preserve both placeholders.

abstract.description: Heading for the abstract block on a Episode Note page.

noteSection.description: Hidden landmark label for the Episode Note body region.

citationGuide.description: Heading for the citation guide block.

citationMla.description: Label for the MLA citation format.
citationMla.notes: MLA is a proper noun (Modern Language Association) — do not translate.

copyCitation.description: Button label for copying the citation to clipboard.

backToEpisodeNotes.description: Back link returning to the Episode Notes list.

companionTo.description: Label introducing the companion video dossier for a Episode Note.

videoForthcoming.description: Status text shown when the companion video dossier has not yet been published.

alienSedition.title.description: Title of the Alien & Sedition Acts episode note.
alienSedition.title.notes: 'Alien' and 'Sedition Acts' refer to the 1798 U.S. statutes by their proper-noun name.

alienSedition.subtitle.description: Subtitle / tagline of the Alien & Sedition Acts episode note.

alienSedition.summary.description: Short summary of the Alien & Sedition Acts episode note shown in the list.

alienSedition.abstract.description: Abstract of the Alien & Sedition Acts episode note.
alienSedition.abstract.notes: Historical statute names are proper nouns and should not be translated.
